Package org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype

Class Datatype

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.core.ast.datatype.Datatype
All Implemented Interfaces:
IDatatype
public class Datatype extends Object implements IDatatype
Implementation of a complete datatype which references all its extensions (type constructor, value constructors and their destructors).

Datatypes which have the exact same definition (except maybe the formula factory used for building it) are represented by the same object. Therefore, this class must not override equals

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    equals(Object obj)
    The datatypes are the same if they have the same name and "similar" type constructors, constructor extensions, and origins.
    FormulaFactory
    getBaseFactory()
    Returns a minimal formula factory that contains all extensions that are needed to define this datatype.
    IConstructorExtension
    getConstructor(String name)
    Returns the value constructor with the given name, or null if not found.
    IConstructorExtension[]
    getConstructors()
    Returns all value constructors of this datatype.
    IDestructorExtension
    getDestructor(String name)
    Returns the destructor with the given name, or null if not found.
    Set<IFormulaExtension>
    getExtensions()
    Returns a set of all the formula extensions defined by this datatype.
    FormulaFactory
    getFactory()
    Returns a minimal formula factory that contains this datatype.
    Object
    getOrigin()
    Returns the origin of this extension, or null if no origin is defined.
    ISetInstantiation
    getSetInstantiation(Expression set)
    Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual sets of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
    TypeConstructorExtension
    getTypeConstructor()
    Returns the type constructor of this datatype.
    TypeSubstitution
    getTypeInstantiation(Type type)
    Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual types of arguments of constructors of this datatype.

    The hash code is computed from the datatype's type constructors, constructor extensions, and the origin.

  • Method Details

    • makeDatatype

      public static Datatype makeDatatype(DatatypeBuilder dtBuilder)

    • getTypeConstructor

      public TypeConstructorExtension getTypeConstructor()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns the type constructor of this datatype.

      Returned extension can be used as parameter in FormulaFactory.makeParametricType(IExpressionExtension, List) as well as makeExtendedExpression(IExpressionExtension, ...) methods.

      Specified by:
      getTypeConstructor in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      the type constructor

    • getTypeInstantiation

      public TypeSubstitution getTypeInstantiation(Type type)
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual types of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
      Specified by:
      getTypeInstantiation in interface IDatatype
      Parameters:
      type - a type built with the type constructor of this datatype
      Returns:
      a type instantiation usable for computing argument types

    • getSetInstantiation

      public ISetInstantiation getSetInstantiation(Expression set)
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns an object that can be used to compute the actual sets of arguments of constructors of this datatype.
      Specified by:
      getSetInstantiation in interface IDatatype
      Parameters:
      set - a set built with the type constructor of this datatype
      Returns:
      a set instantiation usable for computing argument sets

      public boolean hasSingleConstructor()

      public IConstructorExtension[] getConstructors()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns all value constructors of this datatype.
      Specified by:
      getConstructors in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      an array of all value constructors

    • getConstructor

      public IConstructorExtension getConstructor(String name)
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns the value constructor with the given name, or null if not found.
      Specified by:
      getConstructor in interface IDatatype
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a value constructor
      Returns:
      the value constructor with the given name or null

    • getDestructor

      public IDestructorExtension getDestructor(String name)
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns the destructor with the given name, or null if not found.
      Specified by:
      getDestructor in interface IDatatype
      Parameters:
      name - the name of a destructor
      Returns:
      the destructor with the given name or null

    • getBaseFactory

      public FormulaFactory getBaseFactory()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns a minimal formula factory that contains all extensions that are needed to define this datatype. For instance, if the type of an argument of a value constructor uses another datatype, the base factory will contain this datatype.
      Specified by:
      getBaseFactory in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      a formula factory supporting the definition of this datatype

    • getFactory

      public FormulaFactory getFactory()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns a minimal formula factory that contains this datatype. This is a shorthand fully equivalent to 
       getBaseFactory().withExtensions(getExtensions());
      Specified by:
      getFactory in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      a formula factory supporting this datatype

    • getExtensions

      public Set<IFormulaExtension> getExtensions()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns a set of all the formula extensions defined by this datatype. This set is not modifiable by clients.

      Defined extensions are:

    • the type constructor
    • all value constructors
    • all destructors

      • Specified by:
      getExtensions in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      an unmodifiable set of all formula extensions

    • hashCode

      public int hashCode()
      The hash code is computed from the datatype's type constructors, constructor extensions, and the origin.
      Overrides:
      hashCode in class Object

    • equals

      public boolean equals(Object obj)
      The datatypes are the same if they have the same name and "similar" type constructors, constructor extensions, and origins.
      Overrides:

    • getOrigin

      public Object getOrigin()
      Description copied from interface: IDatatype
      Returns the origin of this extension, or null if no origin is defined.
      Specified by:
      getOrigin in interface IDatatype
      Returns:
      an Object or null
